lines.speaker: Viajera
lines.es: Disculpe, donde esta la parada de autobus?
lines.en: Excuse me, where is the bus stop?

lines.speaker: Persona local
lines.es: La parada esta en la esquina, frente al banco.
lines.en: The stop is on the corner, in front of the bank.

responseExercise.prompt: A local says the stop is on the corner in front of the bank. Choose a natural reply.

choices.text: Perfecto, muchas gracias por la ayuda.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Polite and natural after receiving directions.
Understandable Spanish, but less natural after someone helped you.

choices.text: La parada come pan en la mesa.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this transit conversation.

lines.speaker: Viajera
lines.es: Perfecto, muchas gracias por la ayuda.
lines.en: Perfect, thank you very much for the help.

lines.speaker: Persona local
lines.es: De nada, el autobus pasa cada quince minutos.
lines.en: You're welcome, the bus comes every fifteen minutes.

responseExercise.prompt: The local says the bus comes every fifteen minutes. Pick a useful response.

choices.feedback: Great fit. Clear and practical.
Understandable, but not the most natural follow-up.

choices.text: La esquina esta en el boleto.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this timing update.

lines.speaker: Conductor
lines.es: Buenos dias, a donde va?
lines.en: Good morning, where are you going?

lines.speaker: Viajera
lines.es: Voy al centro, por favor.
lines.en: I'm going downtown, please.

responseExercise.prompt: The driver asks where you're going. Choose the best beginner response.

choices.feedback: Great fit. Direct and polite.

choices.text: No se, solo subo al autobus.
choices.feedback: Understandable, but less useful in this situation.

choices.text: El autobus esta debajo del agua.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this exchange.

lines.speaker: Conductor
lines.es: Perfecto, este autobus si va al centro.
lines.en: Perfect, this bus does go downtown.

lines.speaker: Viajera
lines.es: Gracias, me avisa cuando lleguemos?
lines.en: Thanks, can you let me know when we arrive?

responseExercise.prompt: You confirmed the route. What is a practical follow-up request?

choices.feedback: Great fit. Very practical for a rider.
Understandable, but not helpful for navigating.

choices.text: El centro esta en la cocina.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this transit context.

lines.speaker: Viajero
lines.es: Esta linea del metro llega a la estacion Central?
lines.en: Does this subway line reach Central Station?

lines.speaker: Empleado
lines.es: Si, pero tiene que cambiar en Universidad.
lines.en: Yes, but you have to transfer at Universidad.

responseExercise.prompt: The employee says you need to transfer at Universidad. Choose a natural response.

choices.feedback: Great fit. You confirm the key instruction.
Understandable, but not practical if you need that destination.

choices.text: La estacion tiene pan y sal.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this route guidance.

lines.speaker: Empleado
lines.es: Despues del cambio, son dos paradas mas.
lines.en: After the transfer, it's two more stops.

lines.speaker: Viajero
lines.es: Perfecto, entonces bajo en la segunda parada.
lines.en: Perfect, then I'll get off at the second stop.

responseExercise.prompt: You hear it's two more stops after the transfer. Pick the best response.

choices.text: Perfecto, entonces bajo en la segunda parada.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Clear and practical.
Understandable Spanish, but it doesn't confirm your plan.

choices.text: El metro duerme en la casa.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this navigation moment.

lines.speaker: Cajera
lines.es: Necesita un boleto sencillo o ida y vuelta?
lines.en: Do you need a one-way ticket or round trip?

lines.speaker: Cliente
lines.es: Un boleto de ida y vuelta, por favor.
lines.en: A round-trip ticket, please.

responseExercise.prompt: The cashier asks what kind of ticket you need. Choose a clear reply.

choices.text: Un boleto de ida y vuelta, por favor.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Specific and polite.
Understandable, but less clear than choosing directly.

choices.text: El boleto esta en la puerta.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this purchase question.

lines.speaker: Cajera
lines.es: Son cuatro dolares. Puede pagar con tarjeta.
lines.en: It's four dollars. You can pay with card.

lines.speaker: Cliente
lines.es: Perfecto, pago con tarjeta.
lines.en: Perfect, I'll pay with card.

responseExercise.prompt: You hear the price and payment option. Pick a natural response.

choices.feedback: Great fit. Direct and natural at a ticket counter.
Understandable, but it doesn't complete the purchase.

choices.text: La tarjeta va al metro con sal.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this payment moment.

lines.speaker: Cliente
lines.es: Me puede dar la direccion del museo?
lines.en: Can you give me the museum address?

lines.speaker: Recepcionista
lines.es: Claro, es Calle Rivera 24.
lines.en: Of course, it's 24 Rivera Street.

responseExercise.prompt: You receive the address: 'Calle Rivera 24.' Choose a good follow-up.

choices.feedback: Great fit. Natural and practical.
Understandable, but it conflicts with your request.

choices.text: La calle vive en el autobus.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this directions exchange.

lines.speaker: Recepcionista
lines.es: Si quiere, tambien le marco la ubicacion en el mapa.
lines.en: If you want, I can also mark the location on the map.

lines.speaker: Cliente
lines.es: Si, por favor. Asi llego mas facil.
lines.en: Yes, please. That way I can get there more easily.

responseExercise.prompt: Someone offers to mark the location on a map. Pick the most natural response.

choices.text: Si, por favor. Asi llego mas facil.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Polite and very useful.
Understandable Spanish, but not practical in this context.
Off-target for this offer.

lines.speaker: Pasajero
lines.es: A que hora es la llegada del proximo tren?
lines.en: What time is the next train's arrival?

lines.speaker: Empleado
lines.es: La llegada es a las ocho y diez.
lines.en: Arrival is at eight ten.

responseExercise.prompt: You hear the train arrives at 8:10. Choose a natural response.

choices.feedback: Great fit. Natural reaction to schedule info.
Understandable, but less complete as a response.
Off-target for this timing question.

lines.speaker: Empleado
lines.es: Si hay retraso, lo anunciamos por altavoz.
lines.en: If there is a delay, we announce it over the loudspeaker.

lines.speaker: Pasajero
lines.es: Entendido, estare pendiente. Gracias.
lines.en: Understood, I'll stay alert. Thank you.

responseExercise.prompt: You are told delays will be announced. Pick the best reply.

choices.feedback: Great fit. Clear and polite.
Understandable, but it doesn't acknowledge the useful guidance.

choices.text: El altavoz vive en la direccion.
choices.feedback: Off-target for this station update.
